name: VR Club Live - CLOSED ALPHA VERSION

reviews.review_title: How haven' I ever found this app before!
reviews.review_description:
I love this app, great playlists. Brilliant interactions and very immersive. I would love to be able to add in my own playlists. This application has alot of potential! Well impressed! In the future I would definitely like to see us be able to log into an account to personalise and save our avatars, add our own playlists and hold private rooms. 
Keep up the good work VRCLUB!
I love the app but I´ve never seen anyone in the club when I'm connected. It almost feels like being in a real beach club, highly recommended.

developer_response.body: We are glad you enjoyed the experience! To meet other party people, take a look at the date on event posters - you will find them at the entrance to the beach club. See you at the party! :)

reviews.review_description: This is an awesome idea, too bad abou timezones so it's difficult to attend the parties , but loved the concept .

Is this app perfect no! However, I really love the vision behind what the devs are striving for. You instantly feel you are at a beach club. The only reason I have not given five stars is they need more events for different time zones other than that - well done team

reviews.review_title: The World needs this more than ever !!
reviews.review_description:
From the moment I came across this App on Sidequest (almost 2 years ago)  I knew it was going to change how I hang out with friends during the Pandemic. From exceptional graphics to Bhaptics Tactsuit support the developers have taken their time to listen to the community and polish the experience. The music is always bumping and the party is always swinging ! 

I am super excited for the future of VRClub!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your support and help with testing! We try to listen very carefully and improve the functionality while maintaining the maximum smoothness of the application.

reviews.review_title: Cant wait for the Beta PcVR.

developer_response.body:
PCVR free version is out! Check new releases in Oculus app or grab link from our site: vrclub.live

Above is a post where we informed about the closing of the open beta available through the App Lab. Now new users cannot download the application, people who tested it before can download it again and fully test this already old version.
The online functions are working, the stream on the vrclub.live site is from the PCVR version.
